title: Red Wicker Basket For Hampers Make You Own Gifts Hamper Kit Birthday Christening Wedding Gift Hampers (Red)
features: 【NATURAL MATERIAL】Crafted from natural wicker, this red wicker basket showcases a beautiful texture and rustic charm, perfect for a variety of purposes around the home.

【COMPLETE SET】 This basket comes with Paper Shreds in four colour options (pink, blue, beige, and red), along with a pull bow in matching colours and a 100 cm x 100 cm clear cello wrap, ensuring a beautiful finish.
【MULTIPURPOSE USE】This basket is ideal for creating stylish gift hampers, organizing items at home, or using it as a decorative storage solution for various occasions.
【SPACIOUS DIMENSIONS】Measuring 10 cm in height, 28 cm in depth, and 38 cm in width, this basket offers ample space for accommodating different items, making it a versatile addition to your home.
【HANDMADE CRAFTSMANSHIP】Due to the handmade nature of the basket, a 5% tolerance in colour and measurements is allowed, ensuring each piece is unique and carefully crafted.
Great quality basket which could presents perfect gifts beautifully.
The versatile basket can be reused for storage, organization, display etc.
description: Introducing our Red Wicker Basket, expertly crafted from natural wicker, showcasing a rustic charm that complements any home decor. This versatile basket comes complete with Paper Shreds in four colour options—pink, blue, beige, and red—along with a matching pull bow and a 100 cm x 100 cm clear cello wrap, making it perfect for stylish gift hampers. With generous dimensions of 10 cm in height, 28 cm in depth, and 38 cm in width, this basket provides ample space for organizing items or creating beautiful displays. Each basket is handmade, allowing for a 5% tolerance in colour and measurements, ensuring that every piece is unique.
